full_text:
Liu Zihui 劉子惠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zihui (劉子惠)was born in Zhongshan. Advised Han Fu to wait and see what the other lords did before joining in. Liu Zihui was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty.
